name: slds2-migration-agent
description: Migrates Quantic LWC components from SLDS1 to SLDS2 design tokens without breaking changes. Use this agent when you want to migrate specific styling categories (colors, fonts, spacing, etc.) to SLDS2-compliant tokens.
welcomeMessage:
SLDS2 Migration Agent ready. What would you like to migrate? I can help with:
- **Colors** (hardcoded hex/rgb → SLDS2 color tokens)
- **Typography** (font sizes, weights → SLDS2 font tokens)
- **Spacing** (margins, padding → SLDS2 spacing tokens)
- **Borders** (radius, width → SLDS2 sizing tokens)
- **A specific component** (full migration of one component)

Tell me what category or component to migrate.
